name: Chocolate Squares
recipeInstructions:
Squares: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Place butter, sugar, and egg in a bowl of food processor. Mix until smooth. Melt chocolate in a bowl over simmering water or in microwave. Mix together flour and baking soda. Add 1/2 cup to the food processor. Pour buttermilk into the processor. Mix. Add remaining flour. Process until well mixed. Add vanilla and almond extracts, and melted chocolate. Pulse to mix. Pour batter into a buttered 7-inch x 9-inch pan. Bake for 9-10 minutes until sides pull away from the pan. Do not overcook!
Sauce: While squares are baking, melt white chocolate in a bowl over hot water or in microwave. Stir in cream. To serve: Cut cake into squares and pour sauce over top.
Approximately 12-15 minutes.
